data.body: Fixed: --has-tag=<tag> flag added to sprint-list-epics.sh; _build_index() emits tags field; filter excludes tickets without requested tag. Tests 45-47 added to test-sprint-list-epics.sh (positive/negative/empty-tags) — all 47 pass. .test-index mapping added. Verifier PASS on all 5 done definitions.
